title: 你经常网购吗？
pinyin: Nǐ jīng cháng wǎng gòu ma?
description_uz: «Tez-tez onlayn xarid qilasanmi?» — onlayn xaridlar haqidagi suhbat. Bu dialog qayerdan sotib olish (Taobao va JD), ularning farqi (narx va yetkazish), tovar yoqmasa qaytarish, sifat va mahsulotni qaytarishni muhokama qilishni mashq qiladi. Kundalik, foydali so'zlar bilan — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Ты часто покупаешь онлайн?» — разговор об онлайн-покупках. Диалог тренирует, как обсудить, где покупать (Taobao и JD), их отличия (цена и доставка), возврат товара, если не понравился, качество и возврат покупки. Близкая тема и полезная лексика — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «Do you shop online often?» — a chat about online shopping. This dialogue practices talking about where to buy (Taobao and JD), the difference between them (price and delivery), returning items you don't like, quality, and sending a purchase back. Relatable topic with useful vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ jīng cháng wǎng gòu ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 经常，我很多东西在淘宝和京东上买的。
sentences.pinyin: Jīng cháng, wǒ hěn duō dōng xi zài Táo bǎo hé Jīng dōng shàng mǎi de.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, ko'p narsalarni Taobao va JD'dan sotib olaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Часто, многие вещи я покупаю на Taobao и JD.
sentences.text_translation_en: Often — I buy a lot of things on Taobao and JD.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Zhè liǎng ge yǒu shén me bù yí yàng?
sentences.text_translation_en: What's the difference between the two?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Táo bǎo pián yi, Jīng dōng sòng huò kuài.
sentences.text_translation_en: Taobao is cheaper, JD delivers faster.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 东西到了不喜欢怎么办？
sentences.pinyin: Dōng xi dào le bù xǐ huan zěn me bàn?
sentences.text_translation: Narsa yetib kelib yoqmasa nima qilasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А если вещь пришла и не понравилась?
sentences.text_translation_en: What if it arrives and you don't like it?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Kě yǐ tuì huò, hěn jiǎn dān.
sentences.text_translation_en: You can return it — it's very easy.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你最近在网上买了什么？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuì jìn zài wǎng shàng mǎi le shén me?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что ты недавно покупал в интернете?
sentences.text_translation_en: What did you buy online recently?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 买了一双鞋和一件衣服。
sentences.pinyin: Mǎi le yì shuāng xié hé yí jiàn yī fu.
sentences.text_translation: Bir juft oyoq kiyim va bitta kiyim oldim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Купил пару обуви и одну вещь одежды.
sentences.text_translation_en: I bought a pair of shoes and a piece of clothing.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xié hěn hǎo, yī fu yǒu diǎn xiǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Oyoq kiyim yaxshi, kiyim biroz kichik.
sentences.text_translation_en: The shoes are great, the clothes are a bit small.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tuì le, dì èr tiān jiù tuì le.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вернул, на следующий же день вернул.
sentences.text_translation_en: I did — returned it the very next day.
sentences.speaker: B
